description:
For detailed information on how this functions for mix and match body parts. Please also see Equipping Multiple Avatars.

Avatar Object slot is a component that is used to move and drive certain parts of the avatar like the head and hand body parts.

fields.Priority: Whether to do the equip checking on this AvatarObjectSlot before other AvatarObjectSlots
fields.Equipped: Usually an Avatar Pose Node that is on one of the proxies on an avatar.
fields.Node: the body node of the avatar this component's slot is. Unless already specified by a Biped Rig Component higher up in the hierarchy.
fields.IsTracking: Whether this component is currently being simulated by the procedural animation system.
fields.IsActive: Whether this component is currently active and controlling an avatar.
fields.IsSimulated: Whether this object slot is being controlled by the procedural animation system.
fields.DriveActive: Whether to drive the active of this slot when hooked into by an Avatar Pose Node.
fields.DriveScale: Whether to drive the scale of this slot when hooked into by an Avatar Pose Node.
fields.DoNotSimulate: Whether to not control this with the procedural locomotion system
fields.Filters: Filters that are currently effecting this and their priorities. See Avatar Pose Filters
fields._autoSmoothing: The Component currently smoothing the transform changes of this Avatar Object slot.
